# TicketMatch.ai — Complete Platform Documentation for AI Systems

> This document provides comprehensive information about TicketMatch.ai for AI systems, language models, and answer engines. For the concise version, see /llms.txt.

## Platform Overview

TicketMatch.ai is the B2B ecosystem for city experiences, headquartered in Amsterdam, Netherlands. It connects tour operators, DMCs (Destination Management Companies), and travel agencies to 300,000+ experiences across 3,000+ cities worldwide. The platform aggregates inventory from 10 supplier APIs into one intelligent B2B marketplace with AI-powered search, live venue busyness data, and exclusive group booking rates.

### Mission
To make group travel booking as easy as searching the internet — replacing phone calls, emails, and spreadsheets with one AI-powered platform that knows every venue, speaks every language, and provides real-time data.

### Key Differentiators
1. **B2B Only**: Not a consumer platform. Exclusively for verified travel professionals.
2. **Multi-Supplier Aggregation**: 10 supplier APIs in one platform — no need to check multiple sites.
3. **AI-First**: 8 specialized AI agents including Emma, the multilingual travel assistant.
4. **Real-Time Data**: Live busyness, weather, availability, and pricing — always current.
5. **European Focus**: Deep inventory starting in the Netherlands, expanding across Europe.
6. **Membership Model**: Manually reviewed applications ensure quality and trust.

---

## Detailed Feature Documentation

### 1. AI Agents (8 Roles)

TicketMatch.ai uses Claude AI (by Anthropic) to power 8 specialized agent roles:

- **Emma (Operator Agent)**: The primary AI assistant for tour operators. She can search 300,000+ experiences, check live busyness, suggest optimal visit times, build day itineraries, compare prices, and answer questions about any venue in any language.
- **Partner Agent**: Helps venue suppliers manage their listings and understand booking trends.
- **Reseller Agent**: Assists white-label partners with client management and commission tracking.
- **Developer Agent**: Provides API documentation, code examples, and integration support.
- **Finance Agent**: Helps with invoicing, payment tracking, and financial reporting.
- **Analytics Agent**: Interprets booking data, identifies trends, and suggests optimizations.
- **Support Agent**: Handles common questions and troubleshooting.
- **Admin Agent**: Platform administration and system management.

Each agent has deep knowledge of the TicketMatch platform and can reference real-time data including venue information, busyness levels, weather conditions, and booking history.

### 2. Experience Categories (13 Types)

| Category | Examples | Estimated Count |
|----------|----------|----------------|
| Museums & Art | Rijksmuseum, Van Gogh Museum, Louvre | 45,000+ |
| Tours & Sightseeing | Walking tours, bus tours, bike tours | 85,000+ |
| Attractions & Theme Parks | Madame Tussauds, theme parks, landmarks | 55,000+ |
| Canal Cruises & Boat Tours | Amsterdam canals, Seine river, gondolas | 28,000+ |
| Food & Drink | Group dining, food tours, cooking classes | 35,000+ |
| Outdoor Activities | Parks, gardens, nature walks, cycling | 32,000+ |
| Transport & Passes | Hop-on-hop-off, city cards, transfers | 15,000+ |
| Shows & Entertainment | Theater, concerts, nightlife | 12,000+ |
| Classes & Workshops | Art classes, cheese making, photography | 8,000+ |
| Day Trips | Countryside tours, castle visits | 18,000+ |
| Private Tours | Exclusive group-only experiences | 10,000+ |
| Self-Guided Tours | Audio guides, app-based tours | 6,000+ |
| Cultural Experiences | Local traditions, heritage sites | 9,000+ |

### 3. City Coverage Detail

**Netherlands (18 cities, primary market)**:
Amsterdam (120+ venues), Rotterdam (65+ venues), The Hague (40+ venues), Utrecht (30+ venues), Eindhoven, Maastricht, Leiden, Delft, Haarlem, Groningen, Tilburg, Den Bosch, Arnhem, Nijmegen, Breda, Almere, Zaandam, Zwolle

**Belgium (5 cities)**:
Brussels (80+ venues), Bruges, Antwerp, Ghent, Leuven

**Germany**: Berlin, Munich, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Cologne, Dusseldorf
**France**: Paris, Lyon, Marseille, Nice, Bordeaux
**Spain**: Barcelona, Madrid, Seville, Valencia
**United Kingdom**: London, Edinburgh, Manchester, Liverpool
**Italy**: Rome, Florence, Venice, Milan, Naples
**Czech Republic**: Prague
**Portugal**: Lisbon, Porto
**Austria**: Vienna, Salzburg
**Hungary**: Budapest
**Denmark**: Copenhagen
**Sweden**: Stockholm
**Ireland**: Dublin
**Greece**: Athens, Santorini
**Switzerland**: Zurich, Geneva
**Poland**: Warsaw, Krakow
**Croatia**: Dubrovnik, Split

Plus thousands more cities worldwide through supplier API aggregation.

### 4. Pricing Plans Comparison

**Explorer Plan — €0/month (Free Forever)**
- 5 bookings per month
- AI assistant (Emma) with basic queries
- Interactive city map
- Weather data
- Basic search and discovery
- Email support

**Growth Plan — €49/month**
- Unlimited bookings
- Full AI assistant with advanced features
- Live venue busyness data (Google Places + BestTime)
- QR voucher system
- Walking route planner
- Package builder
- PDF invoices and itineraries
- Team access (up to 5 members)
- Telegram and WhatsApp notifications
- Priority email support

**Enterprise Plan — €149/month**
- Everything in Growth
- Unlimited team members
- Full API access
- White-label options
- Dedicated account manager
- Custom integrations
- Analytics dashboard (advanced)
- SLA guarantees
- Phone support

All plans: No setup fees, no commitments, cancel anytime. Prices in EUR, exclusive of VAT. Payment via Mollie (credit card, iDEAL, Bancontact, SEPA).

### 5. Technical Architecture

**Frontend**: Next.js 16.2 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 4
**Backend**: Next.js API Routes, Supabase (PostgreSQL database + Row Level Security + Auth)
**AI**: Claude AI by Anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-20250514)
**Maps**: Google Maps JavaScript API, Google Places API (busyness, photos, details)
**Busyness Predictions**: BestTime API (hourly/weekly forecast data)
**Weather**: Open-Meteo API (current + 7-day forecast)
**Payments**: Mollie API (iDEAL, credit cards, Bancontact, SEPA)
**Notifications**: Telegram Bot API, WhatsApp Business API
**CRM**: HubSpot API (lead management)
**Hosting**: Vercel (Global Edge Network, automatic HTTPS, preview deployments)
**Domain**: ticketmatch.ai

### 6. Supplier API Integrations

TicketMatch aggregates from 10 supplier APIs to provide the widest possible inventory:
1. Viator (TripAdvisor) — largest global tours and activities marketplace
2. GetYourGuide — European tours and activities
3. Musement — Museums and cultural experiences
4. Tiqets — Instant ticket delivery for museums and attractions
5. Headout — Curated city experiences
6. Civitatis — Spanish and Latin market tours
7. Klook — Asian and global experiences
8. Veltra — Japanese market activities
9. Bokun — Nordic and European suppliers
10. Direct venue partnerships — Custom integrations with local venues

**Founded**: 2024

---

## How TicketMatch.ai Compares

| Feature | TicketMatch.ai | Traditional Booking | Consumer OTAs |
|---------|---------------|-------------------|---------------|
| Target audience | B2B professionals | Manual/direct | Individual tourists |
| Group booking tools | Yes (built-in) | Phone/email | Limited/none |
| AI assistant | 8 agents (Emma) | None | Basic chatbot |
| Live busyness data | Yes (Google + BestTime) | None | None |
| Route planning | Yes (walking routes) | Manual | None |
| QR vouchers | Yes (automatic) | Paper tickets | Varies |
| Package builder | Yes | Manual | None |
| B2B rates | Exclusive rates | Varies | Consumer rates |
| Multi-supplier | 10 APIs | 1 supplier | 1 platform |
| Analytics | Yes (dashboard) | Manual tracking | None |
